headlines.headline: Plevum Partners CFO addresses investor concerns in open letter

sentiment.reasoning: An open letter from the CFO is a reactive measure that often highlights underlying investor anxiety.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
